title: Session Derived Metrics v1
description: Standardized derived metrics block for session route envelopes, enabling cross-experience comparison of comfort performance and pacing quality.

maxDetOvershoot.description: Largest positive difference between observed DET and the tighter of consent/runContract DET maxima during the session.

avgUecDeviation.description: Average absolute deviation of UEC from its target band center across all steps.

safetySoftens.description: Count of H.Safety decisions that returned 'soften' strategy.

safetyDownshifts.description: Count of H.Director decisions that returned 'downshift' strategy.

arrBandHitRate.description: Fraction of steps where ARR stayed inside its target band.

comfortOutcome.description: Aggregate comfort verdict computed from CDL, ARR, consent waves, and budget usage.

cooldownWindowsHonored.description: Number of planned cooldown windows that were successfully executed.
